_comment: Tier-2 for kratos rans + specialized: catalog used RansKEpsilonKElement2D3N / RansKOmegaSSTKElement2D3N (with 'Element' suffix, no stabilization tag) and ShallowWaterElement2D3N — none registered. Real names drop 'Element' and add AFC/CWD/RFC stabilization in the middle for RANS; ShallowWater elements are actually BoussinesqElement2D{3,4}N. Verified empirically 2026-06-01 via the kratos_eletype_scanner.
